1.content:
Rouge was flying on the air with a sly smirk. Her sources say that Tails is keeping a chaos emerald somewhere hidden in his house. It was night so she knew that Tails was gonna be sleeping so she unlocks the door and goes inside. Gently closing the door she starts to look around. She looked under the couch, the cabinets, even in his lab. It wasnt long until she found it and smiled as she grabbed it. "Hello beautiful"She said as she was about to turn around but something hit her in the head, making her fall unconscious to the ground. The intruder grabbed the emeraled and hid it back to where it belongs and began to drag rouge to a secret room.

When Rouge woke up she found herself to be unable to move. She struggles as she tries to move around when suddenly a light flashed her. She noticed that she was tied up and a figure came out into the light revealing to be Tails. "Hello Rouge. I was expecting you to come take the chaos emerald"Tails said as he goes to her and rubs her shoulders. Rouge struggles more. "Get your hands off me Tails. And let me go!"She said. Tails chuckled. "Oh i wont. Not until i have my way with you"he said as he held a device. What the device does is...
1.title: Tails's Trap

choices: Perhaps it really is 'just' an arm band?
15.content:
"Well this is new; showing remorse, Rouge? Maybe if you didn't try to rob us, I wouldn't have to do this," Tails snarkily taunted with a smirk, concealing the device in his closed fist just to keep Rouge guessing.

Clearly, all that time spent around Sonic had rubbed off, manifesting in the fox's smarminess towards his terrified prisoner.

Such an attitude was uncharacteristic of the fox, whom dropped the act upon realising he may have taken it a bit too far, the malevolent smirk giving way to a look of concern.

"Relax, it's nothing horrible, I just want you to test something," he explained, untying the rope bindings that had kept his prisoner immobilised.

"Were the theatrics really necessary?" the master thief huffed, giving her limbs a shake until the numbness from being tied up subsided.

Testing? Well, that didn't sound so bad. During her career, Rouge had tested many a piece of field kit for GUN, often of questionable make and function, for similar reasons.

She was a brilliant intellogence asset, but given her kleptomania, specifically for high-value items, it was a sort of payment for all the various goods that 'disappeared' during her missions.

"Did you really need to break in to steal the emerald?" was the vulpine prodigy's equally dry response.

"Touché. Well, what is it you wanted me to try out, then? Visors, armour, your first ever entry into the world of fashion?"

She made sure her displeasure was well-known to the fox, what with her overly sarcastic tone.

"Humorous, but no." Finally unclenching his hand, he held up to the buxom spy what appeared to be a bangle or circlet , bearing all the parkings of a prototype such as the exposed circuitry.

"What you'll be testing is an arm-band that.."

----------------

What does the arm-band do?
15.title: Something else

info.brief_description: Rouge goes to Tails's house to get a chaos emerald unaware of whats waiting for her

Rouge comes to tails house to look for a chaos emerald unaware of what is waiting for her.
